name_en: In stock 23A Wool ⚛️ AS3947 This mother-daemon double backpack is really super good-looking, no wonder it's so popular ♨️♨️ Small body but very good capacity! Large phone, keys, card holder, lipstick, etc. can fit completely 👍 Super high cost-performance 😍 Super cute, black and gold is very high-end. Original Factory ZP MASONI. Dimensions: 16.5*17*12cm
